title: Multiple claude agent in the same window?
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 introduces Dynamic Workflows, which launches hundreds of subagents within a single session to parallelize task execution. The system automatically plans, splits work across multiple agents, and includes verification through a QA crew, enabling faster completion of complex tasks like large codebases and multi-file research.
